page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7nex.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The configuration allocates exactly one thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include any bundled local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high network bandwidth provide a stable performance profile for enterprise workloads without the resource contention typical of shared-core environments. This hardware configuration is suitable for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, enterprise databases, and containerized microservices that require consistent CPU performance and moderate memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7nex.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.7 GHz, with a single thread per core configuration. The system includes 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per vCPU ratio. This instance does not feature local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions. It offers a robust baseline network bandwidth of 40 Gbps. The dedicated compute resources and high network throughput make this instance highly suitable for consistent, non-burstable enterprise workloads such as application servers, web serving, containerized environments, and mid-sized databases.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7nex.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and 40 Gbps network bandwidth for consistent enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core compute platform with balanced memory and high-speed network connectivity for stable enterprise application hosting.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs with single-thread-per-core mapping
Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
40 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity
No bundled local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
Optimized for web serving, application hosting, and database workloads
